1. User logged in admin environment
  2. Catalog, Contacts, Category added to store
Steps:
Step Description:

User click on ""Search engine"" page

  2. List contains next entities
  • Product
  • Category
  • Member

Click on checkbox in the top left corner of list

  1. Amount indexed objects changed in all entities

  1. Blade with list of entities to index shown
  2. List contains next entities

  • Member

  1. All entities selected
  2. ""Build index"" button becomes active
3.
  1. Indexation started
  2. Indexation ended without errors
4.
  1. Amount indexed objects changed in all entities

1.

User click on ""Search engine"" page
